reasoning: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.

concerns.analysis: The output JSON is missing a massive portion of the document. Slides 4 through 14, which contain the actual survey results (Q1 through Q10) including all charts and qualitative feedback, are entirely absent from the 'sections' array. The jump in reading order indices from 45 to 268 confirms this large gap. The placeholder '11 sections omitted for token budget' explicitly acknowledges the missing pages.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Source PDF pages 4-14 containing survey results for Q1-Q10, including multiple charts and text blocks.
concerns.output_quote: The entire content of these 11 pages is missing, replaced by the placeholder: {"_omitted": "11 sections omitted for token budget"}.
concerns.location: Sections array, between reading order 45 and 268 (pages 4-14)

concerns.analysis: The document contains significant visual duplication of content. First, slide titles are frequently repeated within their respective sections (e.g., appearing as both a heading and a paragraph below charts on slides 4 and 5). Second, and more importantly, the entire textual content of the 16-slide presentation is repeated in its entirety in a concatenated block at the end of the document, appearing after the 'Contacts' section. This represents a complete repetition of the document's body content
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The source PDF contains content distributed once across 16 slides.
concerns.output_quote: The HTML screenshot shows the entire content of the presentation repeated in a single block at the bottom of the page (beginning with 'Local Government Committee' and ending with 'tim.johnson@nc.gov') after the slide-by-slide sections conclude.
concerns.location: The final section of the HTML document, following the Slide 16 ('Contacts') content.

concerns.analysis: Several bulleted lists in the source document were not converted into structured list elements (list and list_item types). On page 2, the entire list is merged into a single paragraph with manual bullet characters ('*'). On pages 3 and 15, list items are rendered as individual paragraphs instead of a cohesive list structure.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Slide 2 contains a bulleted list: 'Following last GICC Meeting...', 'LGC and SGUC drafted 10 survey questions', etc.
concerns.output_quote: The list items are merged into a single paragraph: "Following last GICC Meeting,\n* LGC and SGUC drafted 10 survey questions\n * Type of census-related data used..."

concerns.analysis: The email addresses on page 16 are present as plain text but were not identified as clickable mailto links in the structured output, which is a requirement for accessibility fidelity when URLs/emails are clearly visible in the source.

action_items: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.
